title: Lens Stable Release
description: Released Lens v1.0.0. Added complete census demographics, local financial audit visualizations, election tallies, and high-fidelity GeoJSON exports matching PSA standards.

title: Compaws Scaffolding & Beta
description: Released Compaws v0.5.0. Set up database configurations and crowdsourcing schemas for community-indexed, animal-welcoming parks and dining spots.

title: Hub Directory Launch
description: Launched the central mapaPH directory hub, linking development documentation and legal policies for all open-source utilities.
